_description: Mock factory strategies for third-party npm packages — used by test_writer.py _mock_factory()
_note: Each entry maps a package name to its jest.mock() factory function body (JavaScript). Use {pkg} as package name placeholder.

factories.winston: { createLogger: jest.fn(() => ({ info: jest.fn(), error: jest.fn(), warn: jest.fn(), debug: jest.fn() })), format: { combine: jest.fn(), timestamp: jest.fn(), errors: jest.fn(), colorize: jest.fn(), json: jest.fn(), printf: jest.fn() }, transports: { Console: jest.fn(), File: jest.fn() } }
factories.express: jest.fn(() => ({ use: jest.fn(), get: jest.fn(), post: jest.fn(), put: jest.fn(), delete: jest.fn(), listen: jest.fn() }))
factories.axios: { get: jest.fn(), post: jest.fn(), put: jest.fn(), delete: jest.fn() }
factories.express-validator: { body: jest.fn(), param: jest.fn(), query: jest.fn(), validationResult: jest.fn() }
